name: TF-Engram: A Train-Free Engram with SSD-Backed Memory for Large Language Models (2607.07388)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: LLMs store factual knowledge implicitly in dense Transformer parameters, making expansion costly. TF-Engram constructs phrase-specific semantic memory offline from external corpora, stores large memory tables across GPU-DRAM-SSD hierarchy, and uses Early-Exit Guided Predictive Prefetching to hide latency during autoregressive decoding. On Qwen3-0.6B, TF-Engram improves average downstream score from 57.6 to 59.4, outperforming both frozen backbone and parameter-matched LoRA. SSD-backed storage su
